name: Rikako Ouryou
description: She was introduced in episode 6 as a pretty, intelligent, and highly admired student of Oso Girl's Academy who is the head of the school's art club. Her talent for painting is impeccable.    ~!However, behind her sweet facade is a psychopath whose obsession is killing her fellow schoolmates and using their bodies to construct grotesque works of art and have them displayed in the middle of the city underneath a Holographic Illumination. It is unclear as to what is her relationship with Makishima is, but it is hinted that he is helping her carry out her psychopathic obsession. !~ Her father is confined in a hospital in a vegetative state.   (Source: Otaku-streamers forum)
